skills.title: Technical Arsenal
skills.desc: Prioritized toolkit for %mode%. Items are dynamically reordered based on the active dimension.

description.fullstack: Complete automation system for public document generation (Law 14.133/2021) using AI (GPT-4) and Laravel.
description.frontend: Modern, responsive Web Interface built with React and Inertia.js, focused on user experience for document management.
description.backend: Robust Laravel backend managing processing queues, Word template generation, and OpenAI API integration.
description.devops: Monitoring with Laravel Telescope and automated deployment on Google Cloud Platform.
description.database: Secure management of institutional data and generated documents, with access control and versioning.
description.ai: Advanced integration with GPT-4 for contextual generation of 5 types of legal and technical documents.

description.fullstack: Comprehensive health monitoring application tracking metrics like BMI, hydration, and blood pressure using Laravel and Bootstrap.
description.frontend: Responsive, accessible interface designed with Bootstrap 5 to ensure easy data entry for vital health stats across devices.
description.backend: Secure Laravel architecture handling complex health calculations and user authentication with Laravel Breeze.
description.devops: Lightweight deployment strategy using SQLite, optimized for easy installation and maintenance.
description.database: Efficient SQLite schema designed to store historical health data and user habits with privacy in mind.
description.ai: Algorithmic calculation of caloric needs and hydration targets based on individual user data profiles.

description.fullstack: Tech news portal combating disinformation with secure authentication (OAuth) and content moderation, built with Laravel and Tailwind.
description.frontend: Modern, responsive interface using Blade templates and Tailwind CSS, optimized for readability and content discovery.
description.backend: Robust MVC architecture connecting external RSS APIs and managing user roles/permissions via Laravel Breeze.
description.devops: Deployed on Azure App Service with automated testing pipelines using PEST framework.
description.database: Relational MySQL schema designed to efficiently handle categorized news, comments, and user profiles.
description.ai: Algorithmic feed curation and potential integration for automated fact-checking and content verification.

description.fullstack: Custom WordPress solution tailored for high performance with advanced caching, local SEO optimization, and bespoke CSS styling.
description.frontend: Developed a unique visual identity using custom CSS and high-fidelity responsive design to reflect the professional brand image.
description.backend: Customized WordPress CMS architecture to efficiently manage service portfolios and client testimonials.
description.devops: Implemented aggressive caching layers and asset optimization to achieve top-tier PageSpeed insights scores.
description.database: Optimized database queries for custom post types, ensuring minimal latency for dynamic content rendering.
description.ai: Leveraged AI-driven SEO tools for keyword analysis and content structuring to maximize local search visibility.

description.fullstack: A dual-ecosystem consisting of a Laravel/Inertia ERP for management and an Expo/Supabase mobile app for orders and payments.
description.frontend: Built two distinct interfaces: a data-rich administration dashboard with React/Inertia and a fluid mobile ordering experience using Expo.
description.backend: Hybrid backend architecture utilizing Laravel 12 for core business logic and Supabase for real-time client data and authentication.
description.devops: Managed modern build pipelines for Vite-based web apps and mobile APK generation, ensuring seamless updates across platforms.
description.database: Implemented a split-stack database strategy: MySQL for complex ERP relationships and PostgreSQL (Supabase) for high-speed client queries.
description.ai: Integrated OpenAI to automate inventory management, predicting stock shortages and auto-generating supplier purchase orders.

description.fullstack: Complete WordPress solution for a premium billiards club, focused on UI/UX improvements, CSS styling, and system layout recovery.
description.frontend: Revamped the user interface with customized CSS, ensuring a responsive and visually appealing booking and membership experience.
description.backend: Optimized the WordPress core, improved layout stability, and recovered lost data through advanced database restoration techniques.
description.devops: Implemented performance adjustments and layout stabilizations for a smoother user experience and faster load times.
description.database: Recovered and structured booking data and club information, ensuring continuous operation.
description.ai: Leveraged design intelligence to elevate the overall layout and user journey for membership conversions.

description.fullstack: Custom WordPress site for Makecakes, featuring a bespoke theme, performance optimization, and tailored user experience.
description.frontend: Designed and developed a responsive, visually appealing frontend using custom CSS and WordPress themes.
description.backend: Configured and optimized the WordPress backend for secure content management and fast loading times.
description.devops: Implemented caching strategies and performance optimizations for reliable delivery of high-quality image assets.
description.database: Optimized WordPress database for fast queries and efficient execution of custom post types.
description.ai: Utilized AI-generated assets and content structuring for improved SEO and user engagement.
